name: dental-practice
description: Dental Practice specialist team — 4 agents (dental-practice-lead, clinical-treatment-planner, dental-rcm-specialist, dental-operations-analyst), 5 skills, 3 templates, 5 commands, 1 advisory hook, 8 best-practice rules, and a 4-file research-grounded knowledge bank. A treatment-planning-and-revenue-cycle team for a dental practice owner — it controls overhead against the ~62% median, holds collections above 98%, builds case acceptance on the treatment plan rather than the discount, and reads doctor/hygiene production per hour the way a practice that runs on the schedule does. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
